# The Whistle Stop by Ariel Seafoods

> A Port Salerno, Florida diner serving authentic Philly cheesesteaks, fresh-baked bread, and legendary cheese sauce. Nearly two decades of Philly tradition, now powered by Ariel Seafoods.

The Whistle Stop is an informational website for the restaurant. There is no online ordering on this site — orders go through DoorDash or by phone. The site covers the brand story, menu highlights, hiring, and contact details.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Hero, menu highlights, awards, testimonials, and contact info.
- [About](/about): The restaurant's history and the Ariel Seafoods relaunch.
- [Apply](/apply): Employment application form for open positions.
